meaning: vt.涉及,关系到n.(利害)关系,关心,关注,关注,所关心的是
examples: He assumed an air of concern.
There is no cause for concern.
I didn't concern myself with politics.
The administrators said they hope to sell most of the business as a going concern.
Of greater concern though was London Midland, which has had a number of reliability problems.
